Name: Rorrlo Teh
Description: Counted among Ryoqor Terteh's lesser kin, Rorrlo Tehs are sometimes sighted cavorting around the icy heights of Worqor Zormor. In the Yok Huy tongue, their name means “little spirit illuminated by moonlight,” but despite the peaceful image this evokes, many an unwary traveler has found themselves frozen─in jest, of course─by the playful pranksters.

Name: Ornamental Leafman
Description: Encountered along Pilgrim's Traverse in the environs of Il Mheg, this botanical behemoth is thought to be an unfortunate mortal transformed by fae magicks. Whether its extreme belligerence is a vestige of its former self or the result of transfiguration remains unclear.

Name: Fahrafahr
Description: “And from this day forward, the spirits and the Yok Huy shall walk side by side. Dartorgor is proud, I can feel it.”

Name: Dawntrail Krile
Description: “So please, be at peace. Be at peace, Mother, Father.”
